snowman.notes: Gentle scale oscillation 1.0x-1.03x on loop, ease-in-out, draws attention without implying specific motion

soccerball.notes: Ball items: gravity arc bounce with squash/stretch; equipment: pivot swing motion, short loop

sock.notes: Gentle sway or bounce loop as if worn/carried; add sparkle pulse for jewelry-type items

speedboat.notes: Vertical sine bob + slight rotation sway synced to water surface, continuous loop

spider.notes: 4-8 frame leg-alternation loop with slight vertical body bob; tail/ears as secondary motion

spoon.notes: Gentle scale oscillation 1.0x-1.03x on loop, ease-in-out, draws attention without implying specific motion

spreadsheet.notes: Gentle scale oscillation 1.0x-1.03x on loop, ease-in-out, draws attention without implying specific motion

square.notes: Path drawn progressively via stroke-dashoffset animation, then settles into a gentle scale pulse loop

squiggle.notes: Path drawn progressively via stroke-dashoffset animation, then settles into a gentle scale pulse loop

squirrel.notes: 4-8 frame leg-alternation loop with slight vertical body bob; tail/ears as secondary motion

stairs.notes: Mostly static; for interactive pieces (swing, see-saw, drawer) use eased back-and-forth motion

star.notes: Path drawn progressively via stroke-dashoffset animation, then settles into a gentle scale pulse loop

steak.notes: Gentle scale pulse (1.0 to 1.05) or slight rotation wobble, slow loop, optional steam/sparkle if hot

stereo.notes: Short repeating strike/strum motion or surface vibration ripple synced to a beat interval

stethoscope.notes: Gentle scale oscillation 1.0x-1.03x on loop, ease-in-out, draws attention without implying specific motion

stitches.notes: Gentle scale oscillation 1.0x-1.03x on loop, ease-in-out, draws attention without implying specific motion

stopsign.notes: Gentle scale oscillation 1.0x-1.03x on loop, ease-in-out, draws attention without implying specific motion

stove.notes: Randomized scale/skew noise per frame on flame shape, fast loop, optional warm color flicker

strawberry.notes: Gentle scale pulse (1.0 to 1.05) or slight rotation wobble, slow loop, optional steam/sparkle if hot

streetlight.notes: Gentle scale oscillation 1.0x-1.03x on loop, ease-in-out, draws attention without implying specific motion

stringbean.notes: Gentle scale pulse (1.0 to 1.05) or slight rotation wobble, slow loop, optional steam/sparkle if hot

submarine.notes: Vertical sine bob + slight rotation sway synced to water surface, continuous loop

suitcase.notes: Gentle sway or bounce loop as if worn/carried; add sparkle pulse for jewelry-type items

sun.notes: Subtle scale/opacity oscillation on loop, optional rotating highlight or twinkle particles

swan.notes: 4-6 frame wing up-down loop, slight body bob, move along a free-form bezier path

sweater.notes: Gentle sway or bounce loop as if worn/carried; add sparkle pulse for jewelry-type items

swingset.notes: Mostly static; for interactive pieces (swing, see-saw, drawer) use eased back-and-forth motion

sword.notes: Gentle scale oscillation 1.0x-1.03x on loop, ease-in-out, draws attention without implying specific motion

syringe.notes: Gentle scale oscillation 1.0x-1.03x on loop, ease-in-out, draws attention without implying specific motion

table.notes: Mostly static; for interactive pieces (swing, see-saw, drawer) use eased back-and-forth motion

teapot.notes: Wavy vertical steam lines fading upward on loop; or tilt rotation for pour action with liquid arc

teddy-bear.notes: Gentle scale oscillation 1.0x-1.03x on loop, ease-in-out, draws attention without implying specific motion

telephone.notes: Short opacity blink on a light/screen element, or button scale-press feedback, brief loop

television.notes: Short opacity blink on a light/screen element, or button scale-press feedback, brief loop

tennisracquet.notes: Ball items: gravity arc bounce with squash/stretch; equipment: pivot swing motion, short loop

tent.notes: Gentle scale oscillation 1.0x-1.03x on loop, ease-in-out, draws attention without implying specific motion

theeiffeltower.notes: Mostly static; add one subtle looping detail (e.g., light twinkle, flag flap, cloud drift behind) for life

thegreatwallofchina.notes: Mostly static; add one subtle looping detail (e.g., light twinkle, flag flap, cloud drift behind) for life

themonalisa.notes: Mostly static; add one subtle looping detail (e.g., light twinkle, flag flap, cloud drift behind) for life
